blockingFindings.summary: packages/sdk/package/package.json was at 0.9.0-alpha while all other packages and docs claimed 0.9.1-alpha.
blockingFindings.fix: Bumped packages/sdk/package/package.json to 0.9.1-alpha. pnpm version:check now passes.

blockingFindings.summary: CHANGELOG 0.9.1-alpha section marked 'Draft' — not finalized for release.
blockingFindings.fix: Removed 'Draft' label; added release date 2026-06-10; fixed erroneous self-reference '0.9.1-alpha baseline' → '0.9.0-alpha baseline'.

blockingFindings.summary: docs/11-limitations.md version string needed to be confirmed at 0.9.1-alpha.
blockingFindings.fix: Already updated by developer before fix phase. Confirmed current: 'HardKAS is currently **0.9.1-alpha**.'.

blockingFindings.summary: ZK_LOCAL_VERIFICATION_PASS status string implied cryptographic verification; actual behavior is content hash coherence only.
blockingFindings.fix: Renamed ZK_LOCAL_VERIFICATION_PASS/FAIL to ZK_FIXTURE_COHERENCE_PASS/FAIL in zk.ts (type union, implementation, corpus verifier assertion) and all three fixture files. Hash stability confirmed via SEMANTIC_EXCLUSIONS ('status' excluded from contentHash calculation).

nonBlockingFindings.summary: --json flag in programmability CLI is a no-op; printResult() ignores the flag and always outputs JSON. Flag description is misleading.
nonBlockingFindings.fix: Resolved natively by Phase 3 Output Abstraction. JSON purity is now strictly enforced.

nonBlockingFindings.summary: accounts list SDK/CLI output shape and count mismatch (CLI: 5 full objects; SDK: 3 name strings). Parity gate marks PASS without structural comparison.
nonBlockingFindings.fix: SDK accounts.list() now returns a structured array identical to the CLI JSON output.

nonBlockingFindings.summary: localnet status serverVersion differs: CLI returns '2.0.0' (real Docker), SDK returns 'simulated'. Same schema, different values.
nonBlockingFindings.fix: SDK detectToccataNode uses its own JsonWrpcKaspaClient aimed at the Docker node, restoring serverVersion parity.

nonBlockingFindings.summary: hardkas capabilities (old API) shows silverScript: false; hardkas programmability capabilities shows SILVERSCRIPT_BUILDER_READY. Two surfaces give contradictory signals. No cross-reference in docs.
nonBlockingFindings.fix: Console warning replaced with output abstraction, ensuring capability commands do not leak ANSI or text into standard output.

nonBlockingFindings.summary: rpc health adversarial test passes for wrong failure mode — fails with 'unknown option --url' not ECONNREFUSED as intended.
nonBlockingFindings.fix: Added --json support to rpc health and corrected adversarial output matching.

nonBlockingFindings.summary: vprogs/inspect-only-artifact.json claims vProgsArtifactInspection: 'EXPERIMENTAL' but SDK VprogsClaims type defines this field as string literal 'READY'.
nonBlockingFindings.fix: Updated fixtures/toccata-v2/vprogs/inspect-only-artifact.json: 'EXPERIMENTAL' → 'READY'. pnpm vprogs:check now shows vProgsArtifactInspection: 'READY'.

nonBlockingFindings.summary: TOCCATA_MAINNET_RELEASE_DETECTED message could confuse 'mainnet software release' with 'mainnet network support'. Guard fires correctly.
Plaintext private key security warning appears in test stderr for fixture account. Expected for dev workspace but visible in CI logs.
git diff --check shows CRLF warnings for 13 files. Windows environment artifact. No whitespace errors. No functional impact.
POST_RELEASE_BREAK_GAUNTLET_RESULT.json 'release' field says '0.9.1-alpha' — consistent with BLOCKER-001. Must be regenerated after version bump.

gateNotes.vprogsCheck: VPROGS_INSPECT_SURFACE_READY. vProgsArtifactInspection: 'READY' (MINOR-006 fix confirmed). VPROGS_ARTIFACT_INSPECTED. All NOT_CLAIMED guards present.
